contact.title: Get in touch
contact.message: Got a project in mind, or just want to say salam? My inbox is open, and I actually reply.

about.title: About me
bio: I build web apps with Next.js and React, and the part I'm best at is internal tools. The dashboards and admin panels teams open every day to get their work done.

Here's what I mean by that. I built a student progress tracking platform for an education program: a Telegram scraper that pulls in assignment data automatically, an Excel tool that handles the weekly reports, and one dashboard where supervisors see all of it in one place. It's been running in production for a while and people use it every day.

I work full-stack, so you're getting one person who handles everything from the database all the way to the screen. And one thing that's a bit rare: I build in both Arabic and English. Real RTL, properly bilingual, not bolted on at the end.
